_comment.1: Tip/tilt loop with a biquad filter ahead of the PID to keep
_comment.2: loop gain off the ~80 Hz FSM resonance. Pipeline:
_comment.4: fs is the measured loop rate (~333 Hz here; check with -p).
_comment.5: Start with the lowpass below. To switch to a surgical notch,
_comment.6: set mode=notch, f0=80, q~2.3 (see the commented block).

params._note: single-pole-style LP; corner sits in the decade between the ~10 Hz crossover and the 80 Hz resonance
